title: Heliotropium leptostachyum
taxonomy: Heliotropium leptostachyum is a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. It belongs to the genus Heliotropium, which contains over 250 species of plants. Heliotropium leptostachyum is native to tropical and subtropical regions of the world. The plant is further classified into the order Lamiales and the clade Asterids. Heliotropium leptostachyum is a member of the family Boraginaceae, which consists of about 1,600 species of plants.

The plant is traditionally used in some parts of the world for its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties.
